description: The Deny Join node takes in a JoinRequestHandle and a deny reason, and if the world enabled a join verification system using the Verify Join Request node, this node will run and deny the user from joining and gives them a reason why.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Calls an impulse to deny the user from joining the world.
fields.Handle: The handle for the join verification system.
fields.DenyReason: The reason why a user is not allowed to join.
